name: Impossible Banana Cream Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat to 350°F.
2. Grease pie plate, 9" x 1-1/4".
3. Beat milk, butter, vanilla, eggs, granulated sugar, and Bisquick in a blender on High for 30 seconds or with a hand beater for 1 minute until smooth.
4. Pour mixture into the plate.
5. Bake until a knife inserted in the centre comes out clean, about 30 minutes.
6. Cool completely.
7. Arrange banana slices on top of the pie.
8. Beat whipping cream and powdered sugar in a chilled bowl until stiff; spread over top.
